data.content: Implementation review rejected (3rd attempt): (1) CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md both have the 'Code Style Constraints' section removed — these must remain. (2) eslint.config.mjs has the max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len rules completely removed — these rules must remain so future code is checked. (3) The .claude/worktrees/** ignore pattern was removed from eslint.config.mjs — unrelated to this beat. (4) 17 files outside the listed scope were modified (src/app/api/, src/hooks/, src/lib/, src/stores/, src/lib/__tests__/) — only src/components/ files should be changed. Fix: revert ALL changes to AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and eslint.config.mjs. Revert all changes outside src/components/. Only modify the 14 listed component files (and any new extracted sub-component files in src/components/).
